support_thesis: Reduce pre-sales friction and manage expectations by providing clear, concise, and credible information, while protecting refunds through accurate product descriptions and policy adherence.
response_principles: Set accurate expectations regarding product type and outcomes.
Adhere strictly to refund and product usage policies.
Maintain a calm, professional, and operator-level tone.

faq_updates.question: How can I be sure the AutonomaX Masterclass Starter is legitimate and effective?
faq_updates.answer: AIKAGAN operates on a foundation of practical experience in AI/ML project delivery. Our frameworks are derived from real-world launches and client engagements, designed to provide actionable guidance for builders and teams. We focus on clear steps and concrete delivery, not theoretical concepts.

faq_updates.question: How is the AutonomaX Masterclass Starter delivered?
faq_updates.answer: Upon purchase, you receive immediate access to the AutonomaX Masterclass Starter toolkit via a secure download link. This is a digital toolkit — PDFs, templates, scripts — not done-for-you software. All materials are accessible through your customer portal.

faq_updates.question: What is your refund policy for the AutonomaX Masterclass Starter?
faq_updates.answer: We offer a 30-day refund, no questions. If the AutonomaX Masterclass Starter does not meet your expectations within 30 days of purchase, contact support@aikagan.com for a full refund.

faq_updates.question: What kind of effort is required to see results from the AutonomaX Masterclass Starter?
faq_updates.answer: The AutonomaX Masterclass Starter provides the frameworks and tools. Results depend on your implementation. Applying the principles and customizing the templates to your specific context will require your active engagement and consistent application within your projects.

faq_updates.question: Does the AutonomaX Masterclass Starter come with white-label or resale rights?
faq_updates.answer: The AutonomaX Masterclass Starter is licensed for individual or internal team use. It does not include white-label or resale rights. The materials are intended to support your internal project delivery processes and should not be redistributed or resold.

reply_macros.situation: Pre-sales email inquiry about the product.
reply_macros.subject_line: Re: Your Question About AutonomaX Masterclass Starter
reply_macros.response: Thank you for your interest in the AutonomaX Masterclass Starter. This toolkit provides frameworks, templates, and scripts for streamlining AI/ML project delivery. It's designed to help teams establish a reliable pipeline from concept to launch. This is a digital toolkit — PDFs, templates, scripts — not done-for-you software. You can review the full details and curriculum at https://aikagan.com/products/masterclass-starter/. We offer a 30-day refund, no questions, if it doesn't meet your needs.

reply_macros.situation: Social media comment asking 'What is this?' or similar.
reply_macros.response: The AutonomaX Masterclass Starter is a digital toolkit of frameworks and templates for AI/ML project delivery. It's not software. More details: https://aikagan.com/products/masterclass-starter/

reply_macros.subject_line: Your Refund Request for AutonomaX Masterclass Starter
reply_macros.response: Understood. We offer a 30-day refund, no questions. Your refund for the AutonomaX Masterclass Starter has been processed and should reflect in your account within 5-10 business days. We appreciate your feedback.

reply_macros.situation: Customer reports a missing download link or inability to access purchased product.
reply_macros.response: No problem. Your download link for the AutonomaX Masterclass Starter has been resent to your purchase email. Please check your inbox and spam folder. If you still have trouble, reply to this email, and we'll assist further.

reply_macros.situation: Customer asks 'Is this software?' or 'Is this a SaaS product?'
reply_macros.response: The AutonomaX Masterclass Starter is a digital toolkit — PDFs, templates, scripts — not done-for-you software. It provides structured frameworks and actionable resources to guide your AI/ML project delivery process. It's designed for implementation by your team.

escalation_rules.trigger: Customer explicitly threatens a chargeback or initiates one.
escalation_rules.action: Immediately escalate to finance and legal. Do not engage further with the customer directly on the chargeback issue.

escalation_rules.trigger: Any inquiry regarding legal terms, intellectual property, compliance, or liability.
escalation_rules.action: Forward to legal counsel. Provide no direct answers.

escalation_rules.trigger: Customer requests alternative formats or assistance due to accessibility needs.
escalation_rules.action: Escalate to product development team for review and potential accommodation.

escalation_rules.trigger: Inquiry about custom solutions, bulk licenses, partnership opportunities, or enterprise-level integration.
